reasoning: Your current limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. This session involves structured intervals designed to enhance your aerobic base using extended sweet spot efforts. By focusing on Emigration Canyon, we're aligning with a familiar climb as a stepping stone towards the more challenging terrain of the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x12min Over-Unders: 4 min at 209W, 4 min at 242W, 4 min at 256W with 3 min recovery at 209W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
